theme_and_archetype.rationale: The user requested a 'sleek, clean, mostly white background' news platform. Archetype 4 provides the authority, clarity, and structural grid needed for a digital magazine while remaining completely modern and accessible. It is tailored with deep marine accents to fit the diving culture.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Negative space is used to separate news modules instead of heavy borders to create a sleek magazine aesthetic.

grid_modes.marketing_home: MODE A: The 'Tetris' Grid for trending articles. Asymmetric, grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8.
grid_modes.cms_dashboard: MODE B: The 'Control Room' Grid. Dense, functional, grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6.

spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px) to maintain the sharp, sleek editorial magazine feel.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.navbar: Glassmorphism (Crystal Variant): backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80, 1px subtle bottom border (border-[#E2E8F0]). Fixed to top, z-50.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.article_cards: Flat solid surfaces. No shadow by default. On hover: subtle shadow-lg and -translate-y-1. 1px border-[#E2E8F0].
surfaces_and_micro_themes.cms_widgets: Avoid soft UI/Neumorphism. Use Grid Borders (Technical Look): Flat backgrounds, 1px border-[#E2E8F0].
surfaces_and_micro_themes.image_overlays: Max bg-black/40. For hero text contrast, prefer bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 to-transparent instead of a flat heavy overlay.

components.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-none). Primary: bg-[#0284C7] text-white hover:bg-[#0369A1] hover:text-white. Secondary: border border-[#E2E8F0] bg-transparent text-[#0A0F1C] hover:bg-[#F8FAFC].
components.inputs: Shadcn components heavily customized: rounded-none, border-[#E2E8F0], focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0284C7]/20.
components.tabs: Shadcn tabs, customized with h-auto and bottom-border active state (magazine style) instead of pill backgrounds.
components.article_tags: Small, uppercase, tracking-wider, bg-[#F1F5F9] text-[#475569] px-2 py-1 rounded-sm text-xs font-semibold.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must explicitly change state. Images inside article cards should slightly scale up (scale-105) on hover with overflow-hidden on parent wrapper.
motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Use lenis for smooth premium momentum scrolling.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Always include focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2). `data-testid` attributes are MANDATORY for all actionable/interactive elements.

placeholders.description: Google AdSense Placeholder image (use this abstract light ocean texture with 'Advertisement' text overlay in gray color)

Home.layout: Editorial Magazine Style. Header with Crystal Glass. 'Above the fold' is a massive CSS Grid: One main Hero Article spanning 8 cols, with 3 trending articles stacked in 4 cols. Minimalist white background.
sections: Navigation Bar: Logo left, Links center, Socials right.
Hero Article Grid: 1 Main Story (Coral Reef Hero) + 3 Side Stories.
Latest News Feed: Vertical list of articles with thumbnails and an adjoining Sidebar for Popular Articles.
Destinations Showcase: Horizontal scroll or 3-column bento.
Community & Stories: Interactive layout with Instagram embeds and Google Maps for popular dive spots.
Footer: Very tall (py-24), dark background (#0A0F1C) for high contrast end of page.

CMS_Dashboard.layout: Sleek, white background, minimalist. Zenith Dashboard style.
CMS_Dashboard.features: Sidebar navigation. Data tables for Articles (Shadcn Table), User Role Management, TinyMCE integration for article editing, SEO Meta fields in forms.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for a premium editorial look.
Do NOT use HTML inputs, strictly use heavily customized Shadcn UI components.
Implement pure HTML+Tailwind CSS for complex layout asymmetries on the homepage instead of standard container/cards.
Ensure the hero images do not have muddy dark overlays; use gradient overlays only where text needs contrast.
Every actionable item MUST have a data-testid attribute.
For Google AdSense blocks, use the abstract ocean background image from the placeholders section with 'Advertisement' text centered.
